query:
SELECT p.id       AS practice_id,
                       p.title    AS practice_name,
                       t.id       AS task_id,
                       t.points
                FROM topics tp
                    JOIN practices p ON p.topic_id = tp.id
                    JOIN practice_tasks ptk ON ptk.practice_id = p.id
                    JOIN tasks t ON t.id = ptk.task_id
                WHERE tp.course_id = $1
